name: PM-KISAN
description: Direct income support of Rs 6000 per year to small and marginal farmers in three installments
how_to_apply: Apply at local CSC center or pmkisan.gov.in with Aadhaar and land records

name: PMFBY
description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss due to natural calamities, pests and diseases
benefit: Insurance coverage for crop loss, premium as low as 1.5% for Rabi crops
how_to_apply: Apply through bank or insurance company before sowing season

name: KCC
description: Provides farmers with affordable credit for agricultural needs including seeds, fertilizers, and equipment
benefit: Credit up to Rs 3 lakh at 4% interest rate
how_to_apply: Apply at nearest bank branch with land ownership documents

name: PKVY
description: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach and provides financial assistance for organic certification
benefit: Rs 50,000 per hectare over 3 years for organic farming
how_to_apply: Contact local agriculture department or Krishi Vigyan Kendra

name: SMAM
description: Provides subsidy on purchase of agricultural machinery and equipment to reduce cost of cultivation
benefit: 40-50% subsidy on farm machinery for small farmers
how_to_apply: Apply at agrimachinery.nic.in or district agriculture office

name: RKVY
description: Provides flexibility to states to plan and execute agriculture development programs based on local needs
benefit: Grants for infrastructure, technology, and market development
how_to_apply: Contact state agriculture department for state-specific programs

name: eNAM
description: Online trading platform for agricultural commodities to help farmers get better prices
benefit: Access to pan-India market, transparent price discovery
how_to_apply: Register at enam.gov.in or nearest APMC mandi

name: MIDH
full_name: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
description: Supports holistic growth of horticulture sector including fruits, vegetables, and spices
benefit: Subsidy on planting material, protected cultivation, and post-harvest infrastructure
